# Terraform policy reference overview

This section provides detailed reference documentation for Terraform policy, including CLI commands, policy configuration syntax, functions, and test configuration syntax.

@include "beta.mdx"

## CLI Reference

The Terraform policy CLI (`tfpolicy`) provides commands for validating and testing your policies locally.

- [CLI overview](/terraform/policy/reference/cli): Global flags and command overview
- [`tfpolicy test`](/terraform/policy/reference/cli/test): Run policy tests
- [`tfpolicy validate`](/terraform/policy/reference/cli/validate): Validate policy syntax
- [`tfpolicy version`](/terraform/policy/reference/cli/version): Display version information

## Policy configuration reference

Reference documentation for policy file syntax and configuration blocks.

- [Policy configuration overview](/terraform/policy/reference/policy) - Overview of policy file syntax
- [The `policy` block](/terraform/policy/reference/policy/policy) - Configure Terraform Policy
- [The `provider_policy` block](/terraform/policy/reference/policy/provider-policy) - Write provider policies
- [The `resource_policy` block](/terraform/policy/reference/policy/resource-policy) - Write resource policies
- [The `module_policy` block](/terraform/policy/reference/policy/module-policy) - Write module policies
- [The `input` block](/terraform/policy/reference/policy/input) - Define input variables
- [The `locals` block](/terraform/policy/reference/policy/locals) - Define local values

## Test configuration reference

Reference documentation for policy test file syntax and configuration blocks.

- [Test configuration overview](/terraform/policy/reference/test) - Overview of test file syntax
- [The `policytest` block](/terraform/policy/reference/test/policytest) - Configure test targets
- [Mock provider blocks](/terraform/policy/reference/test/provider) - Define mock providers
- [Mock resource blocks](/terraform/policy/reference/test/resource) - Define mock resources
- [Mock data source blocks](/terraform/policy/reference/test/data) - Define mock data sources
- [Mock module blocks](/terraform/policy/reference/test/module) - Define mock modules
- [The `inputs` block](/terraform/policy/reference/test/inputs) - Set input values for tests
- [The `locals` block](/terraform/policy/reference/test/locals) - Define local values for tests

## Operators reference

Reference documentation for the operators available in policy and test files

- [Operators](/terraform/policy/reference/operators): Arithmetic, comparison, and logical operators

## Functions reference

Reference documentation for built-in and plugin functions.

- [Functions overview](/terraform/policy/reference/functions): Overview of available functions
- [`core::getresources`](/terraform/policy/reference/functions/getresources): Fetch resources
- [`core::getdatasource`](/terraform/policy/reference/functions/getdatasource): Fetch data sources
- [`core::gethttprequest`](/terraform/policy/reference/functions/gethttprequest): Make HTTP requests
- [`core::semverconstraint`](/terraform/policy/reference/functions/semverconstraint): Validate semantic versions
